origin.question: 考虑一个时空，其度规为：$$ds^2=-\frac{h(y)}{(x+y)^2}dt^2+\frac{1}{(x+y)^2f(x)}dx^2+\frac{1}{(x+y)^2h(y)}dy^2+\frac{f(x)}{(x+y)^2}d\phi^2$$其中$f(x)$和$h(y)$为非零函数。请计算Einstein张量分量$G_{00}$的表达式，并指出导致$G_{00}$ 发散的坐标条件。
origin.solution: 1. Einstein 张量定义为 $G_{00}=R_{00}-\frac{1}{2}g_{00}R$。2. 度规分量 $g_{00}=-\frac{h(y)}{(x+y)^2}$。3. Ricci 张量分量 $R_{00}=\frac{\left(x^{2}\frac{d^{2}}{dy^{2}}h{\left(y\right)}+2xy\frac{d^{2}}{dy^{2}}h{\left(y\right)}-2x\frac{d}{dx}f{\left(x\right)}-4x\frac{d}{dy}h{\left(y\right)}+y^{2}\frac{d^{2}}{dy^{2}}h{\left(y\right)}-2y\frac{d}{dx}f{\left(x\right)}-4y\frac{d}{dy}h{\left(y\right)}+6f{\left(x\right)}+6h{\left(y\right)}\right)h{\left(y\right)}}{2\left(x+y\right)^{2}}$。4. Ricci 标量 $R=-x^{2}\frac{d^{2}}{dx^{2}}f{\left(x\right)}-x^{2}\frac{d^{2}}{dy^{2}}h{\left(y\right)}-2xy\frac{d^{2}}{dx^{2}}f{\left(x\right)}-2xy\frac{d^{2}}{dy^{2}}h{\left(y\right)}+6x\frac{d}{dx}f{\left(x\right)}+6x\frac{d}{dy}h{\left(y\right)}-y^{2}\frac{d^{2}}{dx^{2}}f{\left(x\right)}-y^{2}\frac{d^{2}}{dy^{2}}h{\left(y\right)}+6y\frac{d}{dx}f{\left(x\right)}+6y\frac{d}{dy}h{\left(y\right)}-12f{\left(x\right)}-12h{\left(y\right)}$。5. 代入计算：$-\frac{1}{2}g_{00}R=\frac{h(y)}{2(x+y)^2}R$。6. 合并 $R_{00}$ 与 $-\frac{1}{2}g_{00}R$，关于 $h(y)$ 导数的项相互抵消，得到 $G_{00}=\frac{\left(-x^{2}\frac{d^{2}}{dx^{2}}f{\left(x\right)}-2xy\frac{d^{2}}{dx^{2}}f{\left(x\right)}+4x\frac{d}{dx}f{\left(x\right)}+2x\frac{d}{dy}h{\left(y\right)}-y^{2}\frac{d^{2}}{dx^{2}}f{\left(x\right)}+4y\frac{d}{dx}f{\left(x\right)}+2y\frac{d}{dy}h{\left(y\right)}-6f{\left(x\right)}-6h{\left(y\right)}\right)h{\left(y\right)}}{2\left(x+y\right)^{2}}$。7. 分析 $G_{00}$ 表达式，其分母包含 $(x+y)^2$，当 $x+y=0$ 时分量发散。
hint: 分母中的 $x^2+2xy+y^2$ 可因式分解为 $(x+y)^2$
